title: ops: plan 0.1.0 to 0.2.0 crate structure migration
description: secretx 0.1.0 was published to crates.io with a single-crate structure (SecretValue, SecretError, SecretStore, SigningBackend all in one lib.rs). The 0.2.0 will be the workspace umbrella that re-exports secretx-core. This is a breaking structural change even if the public API is identical. Tasks: (1) Verify that secretx 0.2.0 re-exports all public types from 0.1.0 at the same paths so existing users are not broken. (2) Decide whether to yank 0.1.0 once 0.2.0 ships. (3) Update the crates.io description and README to reflect the workspace structure. (4) Ensure secretx-core is published before secretx 0.2.0 is published.
